name: gc_147_stability_weight
expr: ts_zscore((cashflow_op - capex) / enterprise_value, 80) + ts_zscore(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp / enterprise_value, 20) - ts_zscore((ts_max(close, 3) - ts_min(close, 3)) / ts_delay(close, 3), 60)

name: gc_148_stability_decay
expr: ts_zscore((cashflow_op - capex) / enterprise_value, 80) + ts_zscore(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp / enterprise_value, 20) - ts_zscore((ts_max(close, 3) - ts_min(close, 3)) / ts_delay(close, 3), 60)

name: gc_144_reversal_decay5
expr: ts_zscore((cashflow_op - capex) / enterprise_value, 80) + ts_zscore(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp / enterprise_value, 20) - ts_zscore(returns, 5)

name: gc_145_smooth_reversal
expr: ts_zscore((cashflow_op - capex) / enterprise_value, 80) + ts_zscore(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp / enterprise_value, 20) - ts_zscore(ts_mean(returns, 5), 20)

name: gc_146_12m_momentum
expr: ts_zscore((cashflow_op - capex) / enterprise_value, 80) + ts_zscore(fnd6_newa1v1300_gp / enterprise_value, 20) + ts_zscore(close / ts_delay(close, 252) - 1, 20)
